summary: Fix missing _emitHook method in LearningEngine. The adviceGenerated hook was registered but never called because _emitHook method was missing. All 22 meta-kb tests now pass.
root_cause: Hook was registered in constructor but _emitHook method was never implemented, so hooks never fired.
fix_approach: Added _emitHook method that iterates through registered hooks and calls each handler with the payload.

validation.notes: All 22 meta-kb tests pass. Phase 1 complete.
